title: Chance of Precipitation
description: A semi-small trinkets mod that adds several risk of rain 1, 2, and returns items into minecraft
body:
This mod adds several items from the popular game series "Risk of Rain", along with some items from the games' mods. (sources to all items will be given, both modded and vanilla)

This mod is also work in progress, so expect MANY updates and changes before the first full release.

List of currently planned items, in no particular order (will be expanded over time, most likely):
- Triskellion Broach (Source: Thinkers Satched Mod, RoR2)
- Percussive Maintainance (Source: Thinkers Satchel Mod, RoR2)
- Interstellar Desk Plant (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Time Keeper's Secret (Source: RoR Returns)
- ATG mark 1 (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Armor Piercing Rounds (Source: RoR 2)
- Soldier's Syringe (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Shattering Justice (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Topaz Broach (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Monster Tooth (Source: RoR 1, Returns)
- Tougher Times (Source: RoR 2)
- Arcane Blades (Source: RoR 1, Returns)
- Hunter's Harpoon (Source: RoR 2, Returns)
- Ceremonial Daggers (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Boxing Gloves (Source: RoR 1, Returns)
- Will-O'-The-Wisp (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Gasoline (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Telescoptic Sight (Source: RoR 1, Returns)
- Aegis (Source: RoR 2, Returns)
- Ukulele (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
- Paul's Goat Hoof (Source: RoR 1, 2, Returns)
